text: Parameter Value Notes Memory 16GB LPDDR5 102.4 GB/s Storage eMMC 64GB 5.1 +NVMe expansion TDP Config 10W / 15W / 25W Software selectable Thermal TJ_max = 105°C Requires active cooling above 15W ISP 4-lane CSI (x2) Up to 6 cameras @ 4Kp60 Why this specific part: The A78AE cores include lockstep capability for safety-critical tasks (flight termination).
